title: Starrett Bi-Metal Hacksaw Blades - KBS1232-2 Safe-Flex HSS Hand Saw 300mm 32 TPI Cutting Edge - For Non-ferrous Metals, Stainless Steel, Pipes, Plastics - 2 Pack
features: PERFORMANCE: Our Bi-Metal hacksaw blades with unique high-speed steel safe-flex technology offer a sturdier construction and long-lasting cutting performance.
DURABLE: A patented solid-state diffusion process produces the industry’s most advanced bi-metal hacksaw blade
HEAVY DUTY: Excellent for interrupted cuts in cramped places or where the blade is subject to bending or twisting stresses
FLEXIBLE BLADE: Safe-Flex technology allows the blade to be flexible, so much so that it can be tied in a knot. Plus, if the blade does break, it won’t shatter into multiple pieces
BLADES TEETH: Starrett hacksaw blades feature a massive increase in tooth strength and reduction in breakage and fracture when compared to traditional bi-metal blades
32 TPI: Starrett bi-metal shatterproof blade has 32TPI, ensures a longer working life, with hardened teeth for maximum wear resistance
WIDE APPLICATIONS: This Starrett hacksaw blade is for heavier-duty cutting jobs, such as steel rods, and pipes. wood, plastic, rubber, bamboo, rope, soft metal, PVC, furniture, etc.

Currently, the company manufactures and distributes more than 5,000 Starrett line products, including fine precision tools, tools for the civil construction market and general industry and sophisticated metrology equipment. Product Information Wide range of saws and blades. Manual saws, cup saws, saber saws, jigsaws, spare blades for cutters, arched saw and various accessories.
